feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to see my blogs in one place?
entry.content:
How do I see my blogs

In the post section I see both but I want to see just my blogs and questions I posted separately?

The way it was before why do this keep changing?

In screenshot below 1st and 2nd are questions and 3rd blog how do I seperate?

 

 

Regards

Vinita

entry.title: Queue error for CIF article master data transfer
entry.content:
Hello,

I faced strange error in #EWM after trying to transfer Article Master Data by #CIF. Site and Customer are transferred correctly but when added an Article to the IM and activate it, process ended with the following message in EWM inbound queue

In the integration model there is only one article and one site - 1001. All landscape settings in customization seems to be fine. What else could be wrong?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Error: Cannot create service instance, there isno database available in Business Application Studio.
entry.content:
Hi BTP Experts!!

When trying to create a new project from template in Business App Studio and after passing all the
default details as per the sap learning tutorial i can see that the new project is been created under explorer,under workspace.

screenshot below:

Now when i try to deploy the database artifact code (as mentioned in sap learning tutorial). It should first create a HDI container and then bound this code to create a physical table. But i am getting below error.

Error: Binding Service DM-hdidb-ws-42hqh failed : Service instance 'DM-hdidb-ws-42hqh' not found: Service instance 'DM-hdidb-ws-42hqh' failed to be created. Error: Service broker error: Service broker hana-broker failed with: Can not create service instance 'DM-hdidb-ws-42hqh': There is no database available. Ensure that you have a database available in space 'dev' within organization '6b16a23etrial'.

How can you assign a database for this dev space under Cloud Foundry (again i see this is deprecate) so it should be the HANA database instance that i created in HANA central (screenshot above).

But how can we assign this database to the dev space.

Can someone guide here

Thanks in Advance.
Mell

entry.title: Subcontracting process process Accounting entry not coming correctly
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I got a query from the users in subcontracting process accounting entry;

Raw material worth 50 issued for sub contracting, sub contracting charges = 500, the goods receipt of SFG product should come 500+50=550 but its coming 500 for the semi finished goods (SFG) which is receiving. The SFG material price control maintained as Standard (S). 

This is the requirement of the user, anyone please help us with the solution for this.

Thanks in advance,

Vignesh

SAP S/4HANA for financial products subledger EWM - Goods Movement SAP Invoice and Goods Receipt Reconciliation SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Finance SAP Pricing and Costing for Utilities FIN Material Ledger MM (Materials Management) FIN General Ledger

entry.title: Closing the purchase order and inbound delivery in the log table.
entry.content: Could you assist me with closing the changes made to the purchase order and inbound delivery recorded in the log table?

entry.title: how to send a url image, pdf file, word doc, text file to AL11
entry.content: I got a requirement and in that I am getting attachement text from sales order and then I need to send it to AL11 and Could you please provide the steps to send url, image format, pdf file, word doc to AL11 directory...I got the text attachment from sales order  into internal table. If it is image format or pdf file, url attachment then what is best way to send it to AL11 directory

entry.title: it is possible to have 5 level aprobal in BCM procedure?
entry.content:
it is possible to have 5 level aprobal in BCM procedure?

I can select it, but it not works.

entry.title: Table sharing in ddic
entry.content: what is use of table sharing in ddic and how to achive

entry.title: Error while posting a parked document
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Hope everyone is fine.

We are facing an issue on the production server. While posting a parked document in FBV0 we are facing an error (Message No AA003 " Asset 2000000000229 0000 is being processed by user ABC" ). This error is persisting, even after closing all sessions, logging out, and attempting to re-enter. Despite these efforts, the same error is still occurring. 

We have tried to implement two notes but they were not relevant to our system i.e Note: 2086875 and Note: 1981871.

Please advice, Thanks.

entry.title: Community Blogs - Page Views
entry.content: How do you enable the page views on your blogs ?

entry.title: Defaulting Due By Date in Service Requests (SMRQ) - Solution Manager 7.2
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Is it possible to default the Due By date during Service Request creation so that the date is + 5 days from the current? If someone could point me in the right direction, it would be much appreciated!

Thanks,

Dustin

entry.title: How to activate the material ledger in S/4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi 

I'm currently implementing S/4 Hana Public Cloud... 'im having problems with how to activate the material ledger

Because currently the price determination and ML Act input is Gray Out, what should be configured in the Cloud..or do I have to enable scope item 33Q ?

Regards

Romzi

entry.title: How can I filter Technology Q&A for "SAP Managed Tags"
entry.content:
I would like to filter the questions that have been posted in Technology Q&A Technology Q&A | SAP Community by the "SAP Managed Tags" that have to be assigned to a question.

Currently I only see the option to filter for the "Top User Tags" .

entry.title: Do you feel the pressure to innovate and adopt cutting-edge technologies like GenAI?
entry.content:
Do you feel the pressure to innovate and adopt cutting-edge technologies like GenAI, but unsure where to begin?

Navigating the complex landscape of innovation can be daunting. It's not just about embracing the latest trends; it's about ensuring that innovation aligns with the needs of your people, is economically viable, and technically feasible. Adding AI into the mix further complicates the equation, as the possibilities it offers are both vast and sometimes overwhelming.

You might find yourself asking, "How can I find the right balance between these factors, including the integration of AI, to create tangible value?"

While there are numerous approaches to this question, our stand-out solution is:

SAP AppHaus’ Human-Centred Approach to Innovation, coupled with its Generative AI Explore Workshop.

Why focus on human-centred design? Often, the most effective way to improve processes is to start by understanding the needs and pain points of the people who actually perform the work. While it may seem intuitive to prioritize certain aspects of innovation, it's only through engaging with end-users that you can truly identify where innovation is most needed.

But where to begin? How do other people and organizations tackle this innovation pressure? This is where thought leaders come into play—individuals who possess the expertise, insights, and innovative ideas to guide you in the right direction.

On March 13, 2024, you’ll have the opportunity to hear from Andreas Hauser, Senior Vice President and Head of the SAP AppHaus Network. With a wealth of experience in orchestrating innovation projects worldwide run by the global SAP AppHaus Network teams, Andreas collaborates closely with experts across diverse fields, gaining insights which he uses to enrich projects with customers.

Join and listen to Andreas share his invaluable insights, and actively engage in dialogue. Post your questions, share your perspectives, and glean insights from a diverse community of innovators.

By the end of the session, you'll emerge with a deeper understanding of today's opportunities, armed with strategies for leveraging SAP's Business AI with SAP Business Technology Platform, in conjunction with the SAP AppHaus Network to propel your innovation journey forward. You will get actionable insights, practical tips, and exclusive access to valuable resources that will empower you to navigate the ever-evolving landscape of innovation with confidence.

Join us here: https://www.youtube.com/live/D_QVQviszaM?si=R0un6RZCOWI-3R5M

Add to calendar: https://url.sap/uxogi7 

We look forward to seeing you!!

entry.title: Excess POs and less sales demand
entry.content:
Hi,

We have excess Purchase orders in some cases with no customer order and some cases only with few customer orders.  This is creating excess inventory issue. COuld someone please tell me from which transaction or report exactly I can check in SAP where we have too much Purchase orders placed and less demand?

Would appreacitae your help. Many thanks

entry.title: SES Budget Exceed Error
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am getting an error while posting SE (ML81N) , there is no long text available for this error. It only shows the budget exceeded by amount x . I even cannot double click this to find out details about account assignment elements, as you can see below in the attached SS.

Please help.

entry.title: Planned delivery time of purchase order in SAP ECC and APO
entry.content:
Hi,

We have the planned delivery time for each purchase order as below. It is the time of the transport and handling resources in APO to this purchase order. We wanted to have as 70 days between France and China. But I am not allowed to change the planned delivery time of this PO in SAP ECC because P10 / P50 are not align with the same data anymore in this case. SO, question: How can I change this delivery date in SAP APO to synchronize or align the planned delivery time in both ECC and APO system?

entry.title: ABAP Cloud Project Creation Error in ADT
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am getting this weird error : You were successfully authenticated, but an error occurred during fetching the Service Instance's SAP System ID.

As i refered atleast 10 different blogs and solutions but still not able to resolve this issue

Simply, I have created abap enviroinment and try to create abap cloud project in ADT , But ending up getting this error.

I have tried booster and manually created abap enviroinment , its of no use

Need your solution ...

Screenshots : 

ABAP Cloud SAP BTP, ABAP environment ABAP Connectivity

entry.title: Getting below error while writing a blog on the new community platform
entry.content: Getting below error while writing a blog on the new community platform. Any suggestions

entry.title: Pros and cons of Delegate search /Export with universe options in Bex based universes in case of LOV
entry.content:
Pros and cons of Delegate search and Export with universe options in Bex based universes in case of LOV.

We face issue in searching LOV for particular values for filtering purpose. When we use objects from Bex based universes for filtering, this issue occurs. In DB, that value is available, but universe object is not showing that object even if we try wild card search. But, if we push the particular value to filter and run, report will fetch data. I believe, this is because of export with universe option check at LOV properties of the object at universe level. And, i see some threads suggest to go for Delegate search option instead of Export with universe. But, will there be any performance hit? Also, if we want to do this option for many objects, is there an easy way instead of going into every object and change the property in universe?
